2606.08938.title: PACT: Learning Diverse Diagnostic Strategies via Privileged Synthesis and Branch Consensus
2606.08938.paper_summary: Clinical diagnosis requires flexible use of multiple reasoning paradigms under incomplete patient information. Existing LLM-based medical agents show strong medical reasoning ability, but single-paradigm or naively mixed dialogue supervision makes these paradigms difficult to learn without interference. We propose \textbf{PACT} (Periodic Anchor Consensus Training), a framework that couples supervised multi-paradigm dialogue synthesis with consensus-based Branch training. At the data level, \textbf{DPS} (Doctor-Patient-Supervisor) uses complete electronic medical records (EMRs) for quality control while keeping the doctor agent restricted to patient-visible information. This produces validated dialogues under four diagnostic reasoning paradigms without leaking hidden clinical answers. At the training level, PACT trains one paradigm-specific LoRA Branch per paradigm and periodically aggregates Branches into a shared Anchor through sign consensus. We further construct a dynamic multi-turn Chinese medical diagnosis benchmark for interactive consultation. Experiments show that PACT achieves state-of-the-art performance among compared proprietary, medical-specialized, and task-adapted baselines on diagnostic outcome and consultation-process metrics.
2606.08938.paper_summary_zh: 臨床診斷需要在不完整的患者資訊下靈活運用多種推理範式。現有的基於大型語言模型（LLM）的醫療代理顯示出強大的醫療推理能力，但單一範式或天真的混合對話監督使得這些範式難以在不受干擾的情況下學習。我們提出了\textbf{PACT}（定期錨點共識訓練），這是一個將監督式多範式對話合成與基於共識的分支訓練相結合的框架。在數據層面，\textbf{DPS}（醫生-患者-監督者）使用完整的電子病歷（EMR）進行質量控制，同時限制醫生代理僅使用患者可見的信息。這在四種診斷推理範式下產生了經過驗證的對話，並且不洩漏隱藏的臨床答案。在訓練層面，PACT為每個範式訓練一個範式特定的LoRA分支，並定期通過簽名共識將分支聚合到共享的錨點。我們進一步構建了一個動態的多輪中文醫療診斷基準，用於互動諮詢。實驗表明，PACT在診斷結果和諮詢過程指標上達到了與比較的專有、醫療專業化和任務適應基準相比的最先進性能。
2606.08938.author: Gen Li et.al.
2606.08938.authors: Gen Li, Yuanze Hu, Zhichao Yang, Qingchen Yu, Jianwei Lv, Yue Guo, Yujing Liu, Faguo Wu, Hongwei Zheng, Xiandong Li, Bo Yuan, Yifan Sun, Zhaoxin Fan
